beIN SPORTS EN 1.original_title: Real Madrid vs Bayern München - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
beIN SPORTS EN 1.title: Real Madrid vs Bayern München - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
beIN SPORTS EN 1.desc: Real Madrid v Bayern Munich is already the most-played fixture in major European competition history. All 28 of their meetings have come in the European Cup/UEFA Champions League, with 26 of them taking place in the knockout stages. Bayern Munich are winless in their last nine games against Real Madrid ; they haven’t gone 10+ matches without a win against an opponent across all competitions since the period between 1988 and 1993 versus Werder Bremen.

beIN SPORTS EN 1.original_title: Sporting CP vs Arsenal - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
beIN SPORTS EN 1.title: Sporting CP vs Arsenal - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
beIN SPORTS EN 1.desc: Sporting CP have never beaten Arsenal in seven attempts, including a 5-1 home loss in last season’s UEFA Champions League. However, they did eliminate Arsenal from the 2022-23 UEFA Europa League via penalty shootout. Arsenal have never won away against Portuguese opposition in the knockout stages of a major European competition before, most recently a 1-0 loss at FC Porto in the 2023-24 UEFA Champions League last 16.

beIN SPORTS EN 1.original_title: Paris Saint-Germain vs Liverpool - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
beIN SPORTS EN 1.title: Paris Saint-Germain vs Liverpool - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
beIN SPORTS EN 1.desc: Paris SG and Liverpool have met on six previous occasions in European competition, with both sides registering three wins each. Their most recent meetings came in the UEFA Champions League last season, where both won 1-0 away from home in the round of 16, before the Parisians won on a penalty shootout at Anfield to progress. In last season’s round of 16 tie between these two sides, Liverpool averaged just 38.6% possession and had 14 fewer shots on target than opponents Paris SG across the two legs ; their biggest negative shot on target differential in a UEFA Champions League knockout stage tie on record.

beIN SPORTS EN 1.original_title: Barcelona vs Atlético de Madrid - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
beIN SPORTS EN 1.title: Barcelona vs Atlético de Madrid - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
beIN SPORTS EN 1.desc: Barcelona and Atlético Madrid will meet for a fifth time in European competition, with all five coming at the quarter-final stage of the UEFA Champions League. Atlético Madrid have only lost one of their previous four UEFA Champions League games against Barcelona, and have eliminated the Catalan side in both of their previous knockout stage ties. Only Paris SG  have eliminated Barcelona more times in the knockout stages of the European Cup/Champions League.

beIN SPORTS 4.original_title: Olympique Marseille vs Metz - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 29
beIN SPORTS 4.title: Olympique Marseille vs Metz - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 29
beIN SPORTS 4.desc: Marseille have scored 2.4 goals per game against Metz at home in Ligue 1, their highest average against opponents hosted at least 15 times in the top-flight. Only against St Étienne  have OM scored more goals at home in Ligue 1. Marseille have taken just 17 points in Ligue 1 this year, fewer than any other team currently in the top half of the table. In 2026, no team has kept fewer clean sheets than OM in the top-flight.

beIN SPORTS 4.title: Auxerre vs Nantes - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 29
beIN SPORTS 4.desc: Auxerre have conceded at least one goal in each of their last 12 matches against Nantes in all competitions, since a 1-0 victory on 1 October 2006 in Ligue 1. Auxerre have picked up 11 points in nine Ligue 1 matches since the start of February, seven more points than Nantes over the same period and only one fewer than they managed in their first 19 matches of the season.

beIN SPORTS 4.title: Rennes vs Angers SCO - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 29
beIN SPORTS 4.desc: Rennes have scored in each of their 27 home games against Angers in Ligue 1, the highest tally of home games against the same opponent for a team while scoring every time in the division. Rennes have won five of their last seven Ligue 1 matches, with only Monaco  and Lille  picking up more points than SRFC  over the period. Rennes are three points off the podium heading into this MD29, having been 11 points behind third place after MD21 and at the time of Habib Beye's dismissal.
